zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Covert III於1148年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾爾頓時，他的父親William le Covert50歲，母親Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington45歲。他於大約1199年與Ellen Ashington在英國英格蘭素可布拉波結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1233年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Covert III于1148年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾爾頓时，他的父亲William le Covert50岁，母亲Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington45岁。他于大约1199年与Ellen Ashington在英国英格兰素可布拉波结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1233年在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Covert III was born in 1148, in Chilton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William le Covert, was 50 and his mother, Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington, was 45. He married Ellen Ashington about 1199, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1233, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Covert III est né en 1148, à Chilton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William le Covert, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Ashington environ 1199, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1233, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Covert III 1148 in Chilton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Covert 50 und seine Mutter Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington 45. Er hat um 1199 in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Ellen Ashington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1233 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Covert III è nato il nel 1148 nel Chilton, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William le Covert, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Ashington circa 1199, nel Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1233, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Covert III(이)가 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 치턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Covert(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 Ellen Ashington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1233년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Ellen Ashington aproximadamente 1199, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1233, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Covert III родился в 1148 г. в местности чилтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William le Covert было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Ashington около 1199 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1233 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Covert III nació en 1148, en Chilton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William le Covert, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Allianore d'Aquillon Baroness of Sullington, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Ellen Ashington aproximadamente 1199, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1233, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
